use_cases: Interactive portfolio showcase with stacked image panels that respond to cursor movement
3D layered image gallery with spring physics animations for visual depth effects
Immersive image viewer with cursor-tracked parallax wave animations across multiple panels
Creative showcase component with cursor-interactive depth perception for photography or design portfolios
Dynamic media gallery with smooth spring-based transitions triggered by user cursor activity
ai_summary: A cursor-interactive stacked panels component displaying 22 images with spring physics animations. The panels create a 3D layered effect with Z-spread, responding to cursor movement with wave-like transformations. Uses Framer Motion for smooth parallax-style animations and includes gradient overlays for visual enhancement.
